name: Supersharers of fake news on Twitter
description: Governments may have the capacity to flood social media with fake news, but little is known about the use of flooding by ordinary voters. name: Fake News Dataset with In-content Annotations and Detailed Lying Excerpts
description: This dataset contains 95 fake news collected from two Brazilian fact-checking services (E-farsas and Boatos). name: FakeCTI Dataset
description: This repository contains the FakeCTI dataset, a collection of fake news labeled with disinformation campaigns and threat actors, an artifact linked to the paper "Elevating Cyber Threat Intelligence against Disinformation Campaigns with LLM-based Concept Extraction and the FakeCTI Dataset".

name: LIARx: A Partial Fact Fake News Dataset
description: LIARx is a partial fact dataset for fake news detection in the domain of US politics and is an updated form of the popular LIAR dataset published by William Yang Wang in 2017. name: LLM-Driven Text Augmentation across Media and Languages
